issues.detail: The skill does not handle missing API key, network errors, or rate limit responses, limiting robustness.

scenarios.name: Enumerate engineering emails at a target domain
scenarios.rationale: Treatment hits /v2/domain-search with department=engineering and paginates via offset/limit with delays, exactly as documented, while baseline only scrapes generic Google dorks.

scenarios.name: Guess and verify a person's email from a discovered pattern
scenarios.rationale: Treatment chains /email-finder with /email-verifier (checking status valid/accept_all/disposable) and uses the pattern token replacement helper from the skill.
